issues.sample: AUTOMATIC DRIVE SHUTS OFF WHEN YOU BRAKE.  HOWEVER, IN A ROLLING STOP AND BRAKE, IT DOES NOT RESTART IN CERTAIN SITUATIONS WHEN YOU ACCELERATE OUT OF THE STOP.  IT IS INCONSISTENT, BUT SERVICE TEAM AT LOCAL DEALER HAVE RECREATED THE SITUATION.  THE CAR IS DESIGNED TO AUTO RESTART

narrative.headline: What 2020 Mercedes-Benz S-Class owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 7 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Vehicle Speed Control (29% of reports).
